title: ANC - Changes persist after restarting the device
scenario: ANC Mode and Transparency Mode settings do not persist after device restart
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Set ANC Mode or Transparency Mode to any value (e.g., High ANC or Full Transparency).
5. Restart the Bluetooth audio device (press and hold the Power button, then turn it back on).
6. Reconnect the device to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate back to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
expected: The previously set ANC Mode and/or Transparency Mode values are retained and displayed correctly after the device restart.
